title: helenium suaveolens
intro: Helenium suaveolens, also known as Sweet Henderson's or Sweet Sneezeweed, is a perennial plant species native to the United States and Canada, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Its medicinal properties are derived from its leaves, roots, and flowers, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Helenium suaveolens include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease respiratory issues, and promote digestive health, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Helenium suaveolens is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to soothe skin irritations, calm coughs, and ease digestive discomfort.
